ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "nickname" TEXT /* Nickname of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number the player was drafted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team name */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference of the team */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who played in the season */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year the season was played */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played in the season */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins in the season */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses in the season */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the statistic belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who achieved the statistic */,
  "minutes_played" REAL /* Average minutes played per game */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Average field goals made per game */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Average field goals attempted per game */,
  "field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Field goal percentage */,
  "three_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Average three-pointers made per game */,
  "three_pointers_attempted" INTEGER /* Average three-pointers attempted per game */,
  "three_point_percentage" REAL /* Three-point percentage */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Average free throws made per game */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Average free throws attempted per game */,
  "free_throw_percentage" REAL /* Free throw percentage */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Average rebounds per game */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Average assists per game */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Average steals per game */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Average blocks per game */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Average turnovers per game */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Average points per game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game log */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the log belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who played in the game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "game_result" TEXT /* Result of the game (win/loss) */,
  "minutes_played" REAL /* Minutes played by the player in the game */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player in the game */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds by the player in the game */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists by the player in the game */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals by the player in the game */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks by the player in the game */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Turnovers by the player in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, coach, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coach_staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coaching staff member */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coaching staff member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the staff member belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., head coach, assistant coach) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coach_staff_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
